kept.text:
BitMine Immersion Technologies is doubling down on its Ethereum strategy with another major ETH purchase, adding 101,901 ETH and bringing total holdings to roughly 5.08 million ETH. 

Despite facing over $6.5 billion in unrealized losses, the company is still actively staking millions of ETH to generate ongoing rewards.

This kind of treasury strategy signals strong long-term conviction, but it also comes with significant exposure to market volatility. It’s a bold move that raises the question: calculated confidence or an outsized risk bet? #Ethereum #Crypto #BingX

tweet.text:
$BMNR Once Ethereum gets its mojo back, this stock will breakout higher and there will be no stopping it.. 🚀

$ETH remains below its 200 WMA and therefore $BMNR has not been shown much love, that will change one day and once it does there will be no stopping this stock. 

You own a stock like $BMNR for when Ethereum enters price discovery, thats when you can really start to see some crazy premiums here.. 

For now the TD remains red and more patience is required, once Ethereum starts to show signs of breaking out, I will be back in this stock and I expect to make lots of money 🤝🏼

tweet.text:
The Bitmine Marine next 8 months' playbook:
• Holding all my $ETH + $BMNR (the ETH-MSTR) 
• Deploy 30% of book into $BTC across spot/ $MSTR/ $IBIT 
• Equal-weight miner basket for AI/compute beta like $IREN $WULF and a few others
• Keep 15% dry powder for a $52k $BTC tag

Bull case: $126k BTC by Q4 = +33% NAV. 

Bear case: -15%, but I bought the bottom.

Ethereum is the future of finance. 

Playbook is developed based on the latest research by @MarkNewtonCMT and @SeanMFarrell on @FundstratDirect 

$ETH $BMNR
